= Mr. Eerie =

{{CharacterInfobox
| name        = Mr. Eerie
| portrait    = https://foundry.atkennedy.com/assets/Images/Portraits/Mr._Eerie.jpg
| level       = 3
| size        = Medium
| hp          = 40/40
| ac          = 20
| perception  = +8
| speed       = 25 ft.
| fortitude   = +9
| reflex      = +11
| will        = +6
| attributes  = '''STR''' +2 | '''DEX''' +4 | '''CON''' +2 | '''INT''' +0 | '''WIS''' +1 | '''CHA''' +0
| key_ability  = STR
| age          = Unknown
| gender       = He/Him
| hero_points  = 0
| wealth      = 2 PP, 25 GP, 3 SP, 8 CP
}}

== Details ==
* '''Ancestry:''' Orc
* '''Heritage:''' Grave Orc
* '''Background:''' Ratted-Out Gun Runner
* '''Class:''' <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/classes/gunslinger.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Gunslinger" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Gunslinger
* '''Key Ability:''' STR
* '''XP:''' 335

== Identity ==
* '''Age:''' Unknown
* '''Ethnicity:''' Unknown
* '''Nationality:''' Unknown

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>⚔ Defense & Saves</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
* '''HP:''' 40/40
* '''AC:''' 20
* '''Perception:''' +8 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Speed:''' 25 ft. (land)
* '''Fortitude:''' +9 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Reflex:''' +11 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Will:''' +6 ({{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}})
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>📊 Ability Scores</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width:100%;"
|-
! STR !! DEX !! CON !! INT !! WIS !! CHA
|-
| +2 || +4 || +2 || +0 || +1 || +0
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎓 Skills</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;"
! Skill !! Modifier !! Proficiency
|-
| Acrobatics || +11 || {{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}}
|-
| Arcana || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Athletics || +7 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Crafting || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Deception || +7 || {{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}}
|-
| Diplomacy || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Firearm Lore || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Intimidation || +5 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Medicine || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Nature || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| New Lore || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Occultism || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Performance || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Religion || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Society || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Stealth || +9 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Survival || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Thievery || +9 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Underworld Lore || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>💰 Wealth & Carry</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable"
! Coin !! Total Value !! Bulk !! Invested
|-
| 2 PP, 25 GP, 3 SP, 8 CP || 45.38 gp || 46.3 / 7 enc / 12 max || 0/10
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>✨ Feats & Features</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Heritage=====
; '''Grave Orc'''
: You were exposed to powerful necromantic energies that should have killed you—but you survived. Your skin is cold, clammy, and gray. You gain resistance to void damage equal to half your level (minimum 1). You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects with the death or void trait.

=====Background Features=====
; '''Ratted-Out Gun Runner'''
: Sure, you've got a checkered past. Who doesn't? It's hard to make a living in the City of Smog, so you did what you could to put silvers in your pocket and food on the table. You made a good deal of money selling firearms from the Gunworks to people who perhaps shouldn't have had them. You even worked with wasteland marauders a few times, sticking up Ustradi barges plying the river between the Gunworks and Alkenstar. Of course, you never hurt any innocents or did anything truly heinous; your criminal career was always just a matter of money.

One day, a corrupt financier named Ambrost Mugland-a true crook if there ever was one-approached you, demanding a cut of your business. When you refused, he put in a word with the shieldmarshals that you'd be a certain somewhere at a certain time with a certain large quantity of illegally obtained firearms. Even though you escaped arrest, your identity was compromised, and your old accomplices have all turned their backs on you. Your gun-running days are clearly over. Now, you're just running.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to '''Dexterity''' or '''Wisdom''', and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Stealth skill and the Firearm Lore skill. You gain the Experienced Smuggler skill feat.

=====Feats=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Alkenstar Agent Dedication" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Alkenstar Agent Dedication''' <small>(archetype, dedication)</small>
: '''Access''' You have been initiated by the grand duchess of Alkenstar or one of her agents.

You put on the persona of a rough and tumble outlaw, but your real goals are to report threats to Alkenstar back to the grand duchess. You become an expert in Deception and trained in your choice of Underworld Lore or Legal Lore; if you were already trained, you become an expert instead. You gain the Lie to Me skill feat.

'''Special''' You can't select another dedication feat until you've gained two other feats from the Alkenstar Agent archetype.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Dual-Weapon Reload" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Dual-Weapon Reload''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You carry your ammunition in a way that allows you to reload while holding two weapons. While you're wielding two one-handed weapons, each in a different hand, you don't need a free hand to reload a one-handed ranged weapon you're wielding.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Experienced Smuggler" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Experienced Smuggler''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You often smuggle things past the authorities. When the GM rolls your Stealth check to see if a passive observer notices a small item you've Concealed, the GM uses the number rolled or 10—whichever is higher—as the result of your die roll, adding it to your Stealth modifier to determine your Stealth check result. If you're a master in Stealth, the GM uses the number rolled or 15, and if you're legendary in Stealth, you automatically succeed at hiding a small concealed item from passive observers. This provides no benefits when a creature attempts a Perception check while actively searching you for Hidden items.

'''PFS Note''' This feat allows you to Earn Income with Underworld Lore with tasks of your level -1 (instead of the normal level -2).
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Fleet" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Fleet''' <small>(general)</small>
: You move more quickly on foot. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Group Coercion" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Group Coercion''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You can strong-arm people effectively, even when you don't have them isolated. When you Coerce, you can compare your Intimidation check result to the Will DCs of up to five targets instead of one.

It's possible to get a different degree of success for each target. The number of targets you can Coerce in a single action increases to 10 if you're an expert, 25 if you're a master, and 50 if you're legendary.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/symbols/question-stone-yellow.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Gunslinger's Way" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Gunslinger's Way''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: All gunslingers have a particular way they follow, a combination of philosophy and combat style that defines both how they fight and the weapons they excel with. At 1st level, your way grants you an initial deed, a unique reload action called a slinger's reload, and proficiency with a particular skill. You also gain advanced and greater deeds at later levels, as well as access to way-specific feats.

'''Way of the Drifter''' You wander across the battlefield, equally at home in and out of the fray.

'''Way of the Pistolero''' You carefully maintain your distance at a duelist's 10 paces with pistol in hand.

'''Way of the Sniper''' You practice a methodical style of shooting, striking from far cover.

'''Way of the Vanguard''' You rely on a brutal combat style that uses heavy weapons and explosive attacks.

'''Way of the Triggerbrand''' You prefer firearms that work well as weapons in both melee and ranged combat
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Lie to Me" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Lie to Me''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You can use Deception to weave traps to trip up anyone trying to deceive you. If you can engage in conversation with someone trying to Lie to you, use your Deception DC if it is higher than your Perception DC to determine whether they succeed. This doesn't apply if you don't have a back-and-forth dialogue, such as when someone attempts to Lie during a long speech.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Orc Ferocity" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Orc Ferocity''' <small>(orc)</small>
: '''Frequency''' once per day

'''Trigger''' You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

Fierceness in battle runs through your blood, and you refuse to fall from your injuries no matter how terrible they may be. You avoid being knocked out and remain at 1 Hit Point, and your Wounded condition increases by 1.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/skills/targeting/crosshair-bars-yellow.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Singular Expertise" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Singular Expertise''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You have particular expertise with guns and crossbows that grants you greater proficiency with them and the ability to deal more damage. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage rolls with firearms and crossbows.

This intense focus on firearms and crossbows prevents you from reaching the same heights with other weapons. Your proficiency with unarmed attacks and with weapons other than firearms and crossbows can't be higher than trained, even if you gain an ability that would increase your proficiency in one or more other weapons to match your highest weapon proficiency (such as the weapon expertise feats many ancestries have). If you have gunslinger weapon mastery, the limit is expert, and if you have gunslinging legend, the limit is master.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/creatures/mammals/bull-horns-eyes-glowin-orange.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Stubborn" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Stubborn''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You don't like being told what to do, and you don't give up. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to expert. When you fail, but don't critically fail, a Will save against an effect that would give you the controlled condition, you can attempt a second save against the effect at the start of your next turn. On a successful second save, the controlled condition ends, though any other effects remain. As normal, failing this second save doesn't allow you to attempt a third save on the subsequent turn.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Sword and Pistol" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Sword and Pistol''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You're comfortable wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand and a melee weapon in the other, combining melee attacks with shots from the firearm. When you make a successful ranged Strike against an enemy within your reach with your one-handed firearm or one-handed crossbow, that enemy is Off-Guard against your next melee attack with a one-handed melee weapon.

When you make a successful melee Strike against an enemy with your one-handed melee weapon, the next ranged Strike you make against that enemy with a one-handed firearm or one-handed crossbow doesn't trigger reactions that would trigger on a ranged attack but not a melee attack, such as Reactive Strike. Either of these benefits is lost if not used by the end of your next turn.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/classes/way-of-the-drifter.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Way of the Drifter" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Way of the Drifter''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You're a wanderer traveling from land to land with your gun and a melee weapon as company. Maybe you learned to fight with blade and pistol as a Shackles pirate, mastered the hand cannon and katana in Minkai, or practiced with a hatchet and clan pistol in Dongun Hold. You win battles by relying on mobility and flexible use of your weapons.

'''Slinger's Reload''' Reloading Strike

'''Deeds''' ''Initial'' Into the Fray; ''Advanced'' Finish The Job; ''Greater'' Drifter's Wake

'''Way Skill''' Acrobatics

=====Actions=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/Passive.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Impersonate" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Impersonate''' <small>(concentrate, exploration, manipulate, secret, skill)</small>
: You create a disguise to pass yourself off as someone or something you are not. Assembling a convincing disguise takes 10 minutes and requires a Disguise Kit, but a simpler, quicker disguise might do the job if you're not trying to imitate a specific individual, at the GM's discretion.

In most cases, creatures have a chance to detect your deception only if they use the Seek action to attempt Perception checks against your Deception DC. If you attempt to directly interact with someone while disguised, the GM rolls a secret {Deception} check for you against that creature's Perception DC instead.

If you're disguised as a specific individual, the GM might give creatures you interact with a circumstance bonus based on how well they know the person you're imitating, or the GM might roll a secret Deception check even if you aren't directly interacting with others.

'''Success''' You trick the creature into thinking you're the person you're disguised as. You might have to attempt a new check if your behavior changes.

'''Failure''' The creature can tell you're not who you claim to be.

'''Critical Failure''' The creature can tell you're not who you claim to be, and it recognizes you if it would know you without a disguise.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/FreeAction.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Into the Fray" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Into the Fray''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: '''Trigger''' You roll initiative.

You know trouble can lurk around every corner, and your hands never stray far from your holsters. You can Interact to draw a one-handed ranged weapon and can then Interact to draw a one-handed melee weapon. As your first action on your first turn, you can Stride as a free action toward an enemy you can perceive. If you can't perceive any enemies or can't end your movement closer to one, you can't use this Stride.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/OneAction.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Reloading Strike" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Reloading Strike''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: '''Requirements''' You're wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand, and your other hand either wields a one-handed melee weapon or is empty.

You make a melee attack and then reload your gun in one fluid movement. Strike an opponent within reach with your one-handed melee weapon (or, if your other hand is empty, with an unarmed attack), and then Interact to reload. You don't need a free hand to reload in this way.

</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎒 Inventory</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Weapons=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/alchemists-fire.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)]] || 5 || 0.1 || 1 || 3 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/alchemists-fire.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)]] || 0 || 0.1 || 1 || 3 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/thrown/bolas-stone.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Bola" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Bola]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 5 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/daggers/dagger-straight-blue.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Dagger" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Dagger]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 2 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/double-barreled-pistol.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Double-Barreled Pistol" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Double-Barreled Pistol]] || 1 || 1 || 0 || 7 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/double-barreled-pistol.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Double-Barreled Pistol" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Double-Barreled Pistol]] || 1 || 1 || 0 || 7 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/sap.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Sap" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Sap]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/sickle-steel-grey.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Sickle" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Sickle]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 2 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/tanglefoot-bag.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Tanglefoot Bag (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Tanglefoot Bag (Lesser)]] || 0 || 0.1 || 1 || 3 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/tanglefoot-bag.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Tanglefoot Bag (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Tanglefoot Bag (Lesser)]] || 2 || 0.1 || 1 || 3 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/whip.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Whip" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Whip]] || 1 || 1 || 0 || 1 sp
|}

=====Armor & Shields=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/chest/breastplate-banded-simple-leather-brown.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Leather Armor" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Leather Armor]] || 1 || 1 || 0 || 2 gp
|}

=====Consumables=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/lights/candle-unlit-grey.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Candle" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Candle]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/chalk.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Chalk" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Chalk]] || 10 || 0 || 0 || 1 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/consumables/potions/potion-bottle-labeled-medicine-capped-red-black.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Oil (1 pint)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Oil (1 pint)]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/rations.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Rations" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Rations]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 4 sp
|}

=====Ammunition=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/shot-round-lead.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Rounds (Double-Barreled Pistol)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Rounds (Double-Barreled Pistol)]] || 19 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 sp
|}

=====Equipment=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/ball.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Ball" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Ball]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 3 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/thrown/bomb-spiked-purple.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Caltrops" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Caltrops]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 3 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/chest/robe-layered-white.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Clothing (Desert)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Clothing (Desert)]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 4 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/waist/belt-coiled-leather-steel.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Concealed Holster" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Concealed Holster]] || 1 || 0.1 || 3 || 25 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/bags/pack-leather-gold-pink.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Firearm Cleaning Kit" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Firearm Cleaning Kit]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/stone/geode-raw-tan.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Flint and Steel" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Flint and Steel]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 5 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/grapling-hook.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Grappling Hook" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Grappling Hook]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/neck/handkerchief-bandana-blue.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Masquerade Scarf" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Masquerade Scarf]] || 1 || 0 || 2 || 30 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/paint-set.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Paint Set" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Paint Set]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/survival/rope-wrapped-brown.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Rope" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Rope]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 5 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/whistle.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Signal Whistle" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Signal Whistle]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 8 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/other-consumables/silencer.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Silencer" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Silencer]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 1 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/survival/soap.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Soap" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Soap]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 2 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/lockpicks-steel-grey.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Thieves' Toolkit" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Thieves' Toolkit]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 3 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/waterproof-firearm-carrying-case.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Waterproof Firearm Carrying Case" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Waterproof Firearm Carrying Case]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 2 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/runes/fundamental-weapon-runes/weapon-potency.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Weapon Potency (+1)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Weapon Potency (+1)]] || 1 || 0 || 2 || 35 gp
|}

=====Bags & Storage=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/bags/pack-leather-white-tan.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Backpack" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Backpack]] || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 sp
|-
| colspan="6" |
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/brass-ear.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Brass Ear" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Brass Ear
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/bags/pouch-simple-brown.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Oilskin Pouch" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Oilskin Pouch]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 5 sp
|}

=====Treasure & Currency=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/copper-pieces.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Copper Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Copper Pieces]] || 8 || 1 || 0 || 1 cp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/gold-pieces.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Gold Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Gold Pieces]] || 25 || 1 || 0 || 1 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/platinum-pieces.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Platinum Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Platinum Pieces]] || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 pp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/silver-pieces.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Silver Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Silver Pieces]] || 3 || 1 || 0 || 1 sp
|}

</div>
</div>

''Last synced: 2026-06-20 01:33''
[[Category:Characters]]
